scope: Aura3D public agent API versus low-level Three.js-style renderer evidence. This is not Unity or Unreal parity evidence.

screenshots.role: material and lighting route visual evidence

claimBoundary: This report proves that peer-benchmark reporting has current screenshot artifacts and machine metrics.
It does not rank Aura3D above Unity, Unreal, or Babylon.
Real Unity/Unreal baseline reports remain separate external-editor work and must include their own screenshot hashes and runner metrics before parity claims are allowed.
